members.name: GetAmount
members.summary: Returns the apply amount of the setting at [param index].

members.name: GetApplyBone
members.summary: Returns the apply bone of the setting at [param index]. This bone will be modified.

members.name: GetApplyBoneName
members.summary: Returns the apply bone name of the setting at [param index]. This bone will be modified.

members.name: GetReferenceBone
members.summary: Returns the reference bone of the setting at [param index]. This bone will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: GetReferenceBoneName
members.summary: Returns the reference bone name of the setting at [param index]. This bone will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: GetReferenceNode
members.summary: Returns the reference node path of the setting at [param index]. This node will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: GetReferenceType
members.summary: Returns the reference target type of the setting at [param index]. See also [enum ReferenceType].

members.name: GetSettingCount
members.summary: Returns the number of settings in the modifier.

members.name: SetAmount
members.signature: public void SetAmount(int index, float amount)
members.summary: Sets the apply amount of the setting at [param index] to [param amount].

members.name: SetApplyBone
members.signature: public void SetApplyBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the apply bone of the setting at [param index] to [param bone]. This bone will be modified.

members.name: SetApplyBoneName
members.signature: public void SetApplyBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the apply bone of the setting at [param index] to [param bone_name]. This bone will be modified.

members.name: SetReferenceBone
members.signature: public void SetReferenceBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the reference bone of the setting at [param index] to [param bone]. This bone will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: SetReferenceBoneName
members.signature: public void SetReferenceBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the reference bone of the setting at [param index] to [param bone_name]. This bone will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: SetReferenceNode
members.signature: public void SetReferenceNode(int index, NodePath node)
members.summary: Sets the reference node path of the setting at [param index] to [param node]. This node will be only referenced and not modified by this modifier.

members.name: SetReferenceType
members.signature: public void SetReferenceType(int index, int type)
members.summary: Sets the reference target type of the setting at [param index] to [param type]. See also [enum ReferenceType].

members.name: SetSettingCount
members.summary: Sets the number of settings in the modifier.

values.name: REFERENCE_TYPE_BONE
values.summary: The reference target is a bone. In this case, the reference target spaces is local space.

values.name: REFERENCE_TYPE_NODE
values.summary: The reference target is a [Node3D]. In this case, the reference target spaces is model space. In other words, the reference target's coordinates are treated as if it were placed directly under [Skeleton3D] which parent of the [BoneConstraint3D].

constants.name: REFERENCE_TYPE_BONE
constants.summary: The reference target is a bone. In this case, the reference target spaces is local space.

constants.name: REFERENCE_TYPE_NODE
constants.summary: The reference target is a [Node3D]. In this case, the reference target spaces is model space. In other words, the reference target's coordinates are treated as if it were placed directly under [Skeleton3D] which parent of the [BoneConstraint3D].
